productDisplayName: Nike Women Lunarfly+ 2 Grey Sports Shoes
description: Built with element-resistant features, the LunarFlyy+2 Shield running shoe from nike is a true combination of performance and comfort. It's stylish look doubles it up as a great casual shoe.UpperMeshed upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced durabilityPerforations on the sides for breathabilityMeshed and padded tongue and collar for maximum breathability and snug comfortLacing system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePhylon midsole with Lunarlon technology for absolute impact protection and stabilityOutsoleTPR outsole with square lugs for optimal traction Flex grooves for a more natural range of motionDecoupled heel with a mid-heel scoop for enhanced grip and traction, and enhanced impact protection to the backfoot Impact guidance line along the outsole for better distribution of shock and enhanced energy returnShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunligh
